testcase.name: crud_flow

table cognitive_assessments (mmse_score integer not null, mooca_score integer not null, score_executive_functions integer not null, score_language integer not null, score_memory integer not null, score_orientation integer not null, trend_points integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, trend varchar(16) not null check ((trend in ('up','down','stable'))), date varchar(32) not null, type varchar(32) not null check ((type in ('initial','complete','follow_up'))), patient_id varchar(64) not null, evaluator varchar(128) not null, observations TEXT, primary key (id)) from cognitive_assessments ca1_0 where ca1_0.id=? Hibernate: select ca1_0.id,ca1_0.date,ca1_0.evaluator,ca1_0.mmse_score,ca1_0.mooca_score,ca1_0.observations,ca1_0.patient_id,ca1_0.score_executive_functions,ca1_0.score_language,ca1_0.score_memory,ca1_0.score_orientation,ca1_0.trend,ca1_0.trend_points,ca1_0.type from cognitive_assessments ca1_0 Hibernate: select ca1_0.id,ca1_0.date,ca1_0.evaluator,ca1_0.mmse_score,ca1_0.mooca_score,ca1_0.observations,ca1_0.patient_id,ca1_0.score_executive_functions,ca1_0.score_language,ca1_0.score_memory,ca1_0.score_orientation,ca1_0.trend,ca1_0.trend_points,ca1_0.type from cognitive_assessments ca1_0 where ca1_0.patient_id=? order by ca1_0.id desc Hibernate: select ca1_0.id,ca1_0.date,ca1_0.evaluator,ca1_0.mmse_score,ca1_0.mooca_score,ca1_0.observations,ca1_0.patient_id,ca1_0.score_executive_functions,ca1_0.score_language,ca1_0.score_memory,ca1_0.score_orientation,ca1_0.trend,ca1_0.trend_points,ca1_0.type from cognitive_assessments ca1_0 where ca1_0.id=? Hibernate: update cognitive_assessments set date=?,evaluator=?,mmse_score=?,mooca_score=?,observations=?,patient_id=?,score_executive_functions=?,score_language=?,score_memory=?,score_orientation=?,trend=?,trend_points=?,type=? where id=? Hibernate: select count(*) from cognitive_assessments ca1_0 where ca1_0.id=? Hibernate: select ca1_0.id,ca1_0.date,ca1_0.evaluator,ca1_0.mmse_score,ca1_0.mooca_score,ca1_0.observations,ca1_0.patient_id,ca1_0.score_executive_functions,ca1_0.score_language,ca1_0.score_memory,ca1_0.score_orientation,ca1_0.trend,ca1_0.trend_points,ca1_0.type from cognitive_assessments ca1_0 where ca1_0.id=? Hibernate: delete from cognitive_assessments where id=? Hibernate: select ca1_0.id,ca1_0.date,ca1_0.evaluator,ca1_0.mmse_score,ca1_0.mooca_score,ca1_0.observations,ca1_0.patient_id,ca1_0.score_executive_functions,ca1_0.score_language,ca1_0.score_memory,ca1_0.score_orientation,ca1_0.trend,ca1_0.trend_points,ca1_0.type from cognitive_assessments ca1_0 where ca1_0.id=?
